---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new agent, skill, governance policy, or capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary
One sentence describing the feature.

## Motivation
What problem does this solve? What workflow improves?

## Proposed Approach
How should it work? Which agents/skills/schemas are affected?

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches you considered and why they're less suitable.

## Checklist (for implementation)
- [ ] Agent file (`*.agent.md`) follows P.A.R.T structure
- [ ] JSON Schema contract in `schemas/`
- [ ] Eval scenarios in `evals/scenarios/`
- [ ] Registered in `plans/project-context.md`
- [ ] Governance grants updated if needed (`governance/`)
